name: Reputation Product Overview
heading: __MISSING__
product_overview_description:
Reputation is a platform focused on managing and improving online reputation. It provides tools for monitoring customer feedback, managing reviews, and analyzing sentiment across various digital channels. Key features include review management, social media monitoring, survey collection, and reputation analytics.

The platform helps businesses track and respond to customer feedback, enhance their public image, and gain insights to make data-driven decisions. Reputation aims to streamline reputation management processes and improve overall customer perception.

Features of Reputation

  • Has a review requesting a feature that comes with custom or templated review request messages that drive more reviews.
  • Track your conversion rate with review requests with real-time review management 
  • Comes with a review response feature that helps ensure that none of your reviews go unanswered
  • Has response templates that help you save time and automate your review responses 
  • Also comes with AI-generated review response features for one-click personalized reviews
  • Helps track review rating, volume, and trend at the brand, regional, or location level.
  • Reputation’s insights and analytics help you understand your overall reputation score 
  • Review feeds help you get a granular view of your reviews, including category sentiment, review emotion classifications, new response labels, and AI Review Response
  • Review feeds can help create review response workflows that fit your business needs
  • Build Local Search pages to ensure that your listings are accurate and up-to-date
  • Convert your reviews into social media content 
  • Build optimized listings and manage them across a single dashboard
  • Measure your listing performance with customizable reports and dashboards

Pros 

✅Comes with real-time review management capabilities

✅Great analytical capabilities

Cons

❌The pricing may not be feasible for all 

❌Customer Support is not up to the mark

❌Limited tech advancements and updates by the team

❌Offers limited customization options

Pricing 

Reputation’s pricing module is not very transparent. However, as per GetApp, it starts at $100 Per Month. One can reach out to them directly or contact them via their website by filling up a form and talking to their sales team. Nevertheless, people find it to be extremely overpriced given their customer support is not up to the mark and they’re missing many other features that their competitors are providing for much cheaper.
